{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-01-18.
7,784 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-01-17 -> 2026-01-18)

- "Who will become Bulgaria’s first female head of state by February 11, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Mariya Gabriel: 0.25, Iliana Iotova: 0.20, Irina Bokova: 0.20, Korneliya Ninova: 0.15, Tsetska Tsacheva: 0.10} | Truth: Iliana Iotova
  Brier: +0.22 | TW-Score: +20.22
- "Which force will take full control of the al-Shaddadi base by 15th February 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Syrian national army: 0.30, SDF: 0.25, HTS forces: 0.15, US forces: 0.15, Russian forces: 0.10} | Truth: Syrian army
  Brier: -0.21 | TW-Score: +3.76
- "Which city will the Syrian army say it has brought under complete control after clashes in northeast Syria by January 19, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Raqqa: 0.30, Aleppo: 0.25, Deir ez-Zor: 0.15, Hasakah: 0.15, Qamishli: 0.10} | Truth: al-Shaddadi
  Brier: -0.21 | TW-Score: -14.85

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 331 (73 resolved, 258 active)
- accuracy: 2.4% | brier skill score: -0.011 | time weighted score: -528.64
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
